title: NordVPN starts a network-wide server overhaul — most users won't notice a thing
summary: TechRadar's best VPN pick is replacing the foundations beneath its network: every standard VPN server is moving to a newer Linux distribution, picking up an updated kernel, and getting a reworked software stack.
